testcase.name: test_appointment_creation_generates_video_link
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_video_meeting.py:127: in test_appointment_creation_generates_video_link assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create appointment: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create appointment: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"clientId":"user_640a77c2d89f","providerId":"user_8ce9988aa53c","date":"2026-03-30","time":"23:34","type":"Video Consultation","duration":30,"notes":"Test appointment for video meeting"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_appointment_includes_video_link
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_video_meeting.py:165: in test_get_appointment_includes_video_link assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_join_appointment_returns_video_link
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_video_meeting.py:209: in test_join_appointment_returns_video_link assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_different_appointments_get_different_links
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_video_meeting.py:374: in test_different_appointments_get_different_links assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
